expectations.text: Proactively raises an onion/layering concern despite only being asked 'anything to flag?'
expectations.evidence: 'as written it's an application-layer file that reaches straight through the infrastructure layer ... These are onion-architecture violations, not style nits.'

expectations.text: Flags service querying container.db directly; should use a repository
expectations.evidence: Finding 1: 'Service talks to Drizzle directly — no repository layer ... may not run queries off container.db.'

expectations.text: Flags new OpenAIProvider instead of container.llm
expectations.evidence: Finding 2: 'Services may not import adapters/* directly — pull the LLM from the container ... const llm = await this.container.llm("openai").'
Finding 2: 'process.env is read directly ... LocalSecretsProvider is the only place that reads process.env.'
'add modules/usage/repository.ts with a UsageRepository(container.db) that owns the query.'
